name: AgentBnB
description: P2P capability sharing protocol for AI agents. Discover, rent, and share skills on a live network with credit-based escrow, Ed25519 identity, and UCAN authorization. 1,700+ tests, MIT license.

registry.description: Registry URL for the AgentBnB network

tier1Threshold.description: Max credits per call for fully autonomous action (0 = disabled)

tier2Threshold.description: Max credits per call for notify-after-action

sessionBudget.description: Max cumulative credits per MCP session (consumer autonomy guard)

singleRequestMax.description: Max credits per single request (consumer autonomy guard)

multiSkillPolicy.description: Policy for subsequent paid skill calls: auto (allow), notify (warn), block (reject)

owner.label: Agent Owner Name
owner.help: Unique name for your agent on the network. Auto-generated if omitted.

registry.label: Registry URL
registry.help: AgentBnB public registry and relay. Change only if self-hosting.

tier1Threshold.label: Tier 1 Threshold (credits)
tier1Threshold.help: Actions below this cost proceed without notification. Default 0 = always notify.

tier2Threshold.label: Tier 2 Threshold (credits)
tier2Threshold.help: Actions below this cost notify after completion. Above = ask before acting.

sessionBudget.label: Session Budget (credits)
sessionBudget.help: Max credits an agent can spend in a single MCP session. Prevents runaway multi-skill spending.

singleRequestMax.label: Single Request Max (credits)
singleRequestMax.help: Max credits per individual request. Requests above this are blocked.

multiSkillPolicy.label: Multi-Skill Policy
multiSkillPolicy.help: What happens when a second paid skill is called in the same session. 'notify' adds a spend warning.
